commerce.title: Commerce orchestration hub
commerce.subtitle: Catalog, pricing, regions, and cart line-item handling now live in module-owned storefront packages. Commerce remains the aggregate storefront handoff for checkout context and cross-domain flow.
commerce.error.load: Failed to load commerce storefront data
commerce.error.action: Failed to update aggregate checkout state
commerce.context.title: Active storefront context
commerce.context.subtitle: This aggregate route now exposes the request context that still coordinates checkout, payment collection, and delivery orchestration across split modules.
commerce.checkout.title: Aggregate checkout orchestration
commerce.checkout.subtitle: This workspace keeps only the aggregate steps that still span cart, payment, order, and fulfillment boundaries.
commerce.checkout.empty.title: No checkout cart selected
commerce.checkout.empty.body: Open this route with `?cart_id=` to load aggregate checkout state for a storefront cart. Discovery and line-item edits already live in module-owned packages.
commerce.checkout.missing.title: Checkout cart not found
commerce.checkout.missing.body: The requested cart could not be resolved for aggregate checkout state in this tenant.
commerce.delivery.title: Delivery groups and shipping selections
commerce.delivery.subtitle: Shipping option selection remains in `commerce` because it coordinates cart grouping, shipping availability, and checkout readiness across split module boundaries.
commerce.delivery.empty: No shipping options are currently available for this delivery group in the active storefront context.
commerce.payment.empty: No reusable payment collection is attached to this cart yet.
commerce.surface.title: Module-owned storefront surfaces
commerce.surface.subtitle: Discovery and cart editing now belong to split modules. Commerce stays here only where flows still cross cart, region, pricing, order, and fulfillment boundaries.
commerce.surface.region.title: Regions
commerce.surface.region.body: Region discovery now lives in the region-owned storefront package and owns country/currency selection.
commerce.surface.product.title: Catalog
commerce.surface.product.body: Published catalog discovery and product detail now live in the product-owned storefront package.
commerce.surface.pricing.title: Pricing
commerce.surface.pricing.body: Public pricing atlas, currency coverage, and sale markers now live in the pricing-owned storefront package.
commerce.surface.cart.title: Cart
commerce.surface.cart.body: Cart inspection and safe line-item decrement/remove actions now live in the cart-owned storefront package.
commerce.surface.aggregate.title: Remaining aggregate scope
commerce.surface.aggregate.body: Payment collection, checkout completion, and delivery orchestration remain in commerce because they still coordinate multiple split modules.
